query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "opid: on-policy skill distillation for agentic reinforcement learning" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the core mechanism of "policy distillation" within a reinforcement learning context, which is the central technical component of the user's query regarding "OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation." Although the paper focuses on robotics and continual learning rather than linguistics, it provides the foundational empirical evidence for the distillation mechanism that the user's proposed work aims to extend to a new domain.
